name: Investment Team
description_en: Four-role parallel research team applying the Buffett/Munger/Duan/Li Lu frameworks to a single investment target.
description_zh: 四角色并行研究团队，对单个投资标的应用巴菲特/芒格/段永平/李录框架。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It creates a multi-agent team—business analyst, financial analyst, industry researcher, and risk assessor—to research a company in parallel and synthesize a verdict.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。创建多 Agent 团队——商业分析师、财务分析师、行业研究员、风险评估师——并行研究一家公司并综合出结论。
sec_note_en: Spawns background subagents, runs local Python tools, and performs web searches. No external accounts required.
sec_note_zh: 会启动后台子代理、运行本地 Python 工具并执行网络搜索。无需外部账号。
